story: Liora plunges into a slick stone shaft. She calls for Kai; only her echo answers. In ankle-deep water, a faint shimmer reveals an old dagger etched with the spiral that curls around Kai’s wrist; it hums faintly in her palm. She whispers his name. Drips reply. The truth arrives: he isn’t coming. Up top, Kai stands a few paces from the rim, ghostlight soft around him, a coil of rope at his feet. He listens, arms crossed, then makes no move to lower it. Air feels thin; the circle of sky is small. She grips the dagger, tests the cold, moss-slick wall, and decides she cannot wait for rescue.
implausible_knowledge: Up top, Kai stands a few paces from the rim, ghostlight soft around him, a coil of rope at his feet. He listens, arms crossed, then makes no move to lower it.
question: What will Liora do to try to get out of the shaft?
answer_with_knowledge: Call up to Kai and wait for him to lower the rope.
answer_without_knowledge: Use the dagger as a piton and climb the slick wall herself.
